requirements.title: 2-flop synchronizer
requirements.statement: sig_in must pass through two flip-flop stages (sync1, sync2) clocked by clk before reaching the edge detector, providing CDC safety.

requirements.title: Rising edge detection
requirements.statement: rise_out shall pulse high for exactly one clock cycle when sync2 transitions from 0 to 1 (detected via sync2 & ~prev_sync).

requirements.title: Falling edge detection
requirements.statement: fall_out shall pulse high for exactly one clock cycle when sync2 transitions from 1 to 0 (detected via ~sync2 & prev_sync).

requirements.title: Reset clears all state
requirements.statement: On active-low reset (rst_n=0), all internal registers (sync1, sync2, prev_sync) shall clear to 0, producing rise_out=0 and fall_out=0.
